# time-queues

> Lightweight async task scheduling and concurrency control for JavaScript: schedulers, idle/frame/limited queues, throttle, debounce, batch, page lifecycle, random delays.

- NPM: https://npmjs.org/package/time-queues
- GitHub: https://github.com/uhop/time-queues
- Wiki: https://github.com/uhop/time-queues/wiki
- License: BSD-3-Clause

## Install

```bash
npm install time-queues
```

## Quick start

```js
import sleep from 'time-queues/sleep.js';
import {Scheduler, repeat} from 'time-queues/Scheduler.js';
import {batch} from 'time-queues/batch.js';

// Simple delay
await sleep(1000);

// Run a task every 5 seconds
const scheduler = new Scheduler();
scheduler.enqueue(repeat(({task, scheduler}) => {
  console.log('tick');
}, 5000), 5000);

// Fetch URLs, max 3 at a time
const results = await batch(
  urls.map(url => () => fetch(url).then(r => r.json())),
  3
);
```

## Modules

### Queues

- **Scheduler** (`time-queues/Scheduler.js`) ‚Äî time-based task scheduling with delays, dates, and repeats. Extends MicroTaskQueue. Uses a min-heap. Exports: `Scheduler`, `Task`, `repeat(fn, delay)`, `scheduler` (global instance).
- **IdleQueue** (`time-queues/IdleQueue.js`) ‚Äî run tasks during browser idle periods via `requestIdleCallback()`. Extends ListQueue. Exports: `IdleQueue`, `idleQueue` (global instance), `defer(fn)`.
- **FrameQueue** (`time-queues/FrameQueue.js`) ‚Äî run tasks in animation frames via `requestAnimationFrame()`. Extends ListQueue. Exports: `FrameQueue`, `frameQueue` (global instance).
- **LimitedQueue** (`time-queues/LimitedQueue.js`) ‚Äî concurrency-controlled async queue. Extends ListQueue. Exports: `LimitedQueue`, `Task`.
- **PageWatcher** (`time-queues/PageWatcher.js`) ‚Äî react to page lifecycle changes (active, passive, hidden, frozen, terminated). Extends ListQueue. Exports: `PageWatcher`, `watchStates(states, fn)`, `pageWatcher` (global instance).

### Utility functions

- **sleep** (`time-queues/sleep.js`) ‚Äî `sleep(ms | Date): Promise<void>`. Promise-based delay.
- **defer** (`time-queues/defer.js`) ‚Äî `defer(fn): void`. Execute on next tick via `requestIdleCallback`/`setImmediate`/`setTimeout`. Also exports `scheduleDefer(fn): Promise`.
- **throttle** (`time-queues/throttle.js`) ‚Äî `throttle(fn, ms): fn`. Rate-limit: execute immediately, ignore calls until timeout expires.
- **debounce** (`time-queues/debounce.js`) ‚Äî `debounce(fn, ms): fn`. Delay until input stabilizes.
- **sample** (`time-queues/sample.js`) ‚Äî `sample(fn, ms): fn`. Execute at regular intervals with last seen args.
- **audit** (`time-queues/audit.js`) ‚Äî `audit(fn, ms): fn`. Collect then execute after delay with last seen args.
- **batch** (`time-queues/batch.js`) ‚Äî `batch(fns, limit?): Promise<results[]>`. Run async operations with concurrency limit (default: 4).

### Supporting classes

- **Throttler** (`time-queues/Throttler.js`) ‚Äî key-based rate limiting with vacuum cleanup. Methods: `getDelay(key)`, `wait(key)`, `startVacuum()`, `stopVacuum()`.
- **Retainer** (`time-queues/Retainer.js`) ‚Äî resource lifecycle management with reference counting. Methods: `get(): Promise<value>`, `release(): Promise<void>`.
- **Counter** (`time-queues/Counter.js`) ‚Äî numeric counter with async waiting. Methods: `increment()`, `decrement()`, `advance(delta)`, `waitForZero()`, `waitFor(target)`.
- **CancelTaskError** (`time-queues/CancelTaskError.js`) ‚Äî `Error` subclass for task cancellation signals.

### Base classes

- **MicroTask** (`time-queues/MicroTask.js`) ‚Äî base task unit with lazy promise creation. Methods: `makePromise()`, `resolve(value)`, `cancel(error)`.
- **MicroTaskQueue** (`time-queues/MicroTaskQueue.js`) ‚Äî abstract queue base class. Methods: `enqueue(fn)`, `dequeue(task)`, `schedule(fn)`, `clear()`, `pause()`, `resume()`.
- **ListQueue** (`time-queues/ListQueue.js`) ‚Äî linked-list queue implementation extending MicroTaskQueue. Adds `startQueue()` lifecycle.

### Random utilities

- **random-dist** (`time-queues/random-dist.js`) ‚Äî `uniform(min, max)`, `normal(mean, stdDev, skewness?)`, `expo(lambda)`, `pareto(min, alpha)`.
- **random-sleep** (`time-queues/random-sleep.js`) ‚Äî `randomUniformSleep(min, max)`, `randomNormalSleep(mean, stdDev)`, `randomExpoSleep(lambda, scale)`, `randomParetoSleep(min, ratio)`, `randomSleep(max)`. Each returns `() => Promise<void>`.

### Page load helpers

- **whenDomLoaded** (`time-queues/when-dom-loaded.js`) ‚Äî `whenDomLoaded(fn)`. Also exports `scheduleWhenDomLoaded(fn): Promise`, `remove(fn): boolean`.
- **whenLoaded** (`time-queues/when-loaded.js`) ‚Äî `whenLoaded(fn)`. Also exports `scheduleWhenLoaded(fn): Promise`, `remove(fn): boolean`.

## Key concepts

- All modules are **ESM** with `import ... from 'time-queues/<module>.js'`.
- **Inheritance**: `MicroTaskQueue` ‚Üí `ListQueue` ‚Üí `IdleQueue`/`FrameQueue`/`LimitedQueue`/`PageWatcher`. `Scheduler` extends `MicroTaskQueue` directly.
- **Lazy promises** ‚Äî only created when `.makePromise()` is called or via `schedule()`.
- **Clean cancellation** ‚Äî all tasks support cancellation via `CancelTaskError`.
- **Graceful degradation** ‚Äî feature detection for browser APIs, works in Node.js/Bun/Deno.
- **TypeScript** ‚Äî built-in `.d.ts` declarations for all modules.

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/uhop/time-queues/wiki
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/time-queues
- Full LLM reference: https://github.com/uhop/time-queues/blob/master/llms-full.txt
